title: bro/ken
description:
I am back.
This is a fan-made version of The Broken Script.
body:
# bro/ken
I am back.

Alpha preview for the broken mod.
Requires Fabric API for 1.19.3.
Multiplayer supported.

What this mod does:
- It generates structures
- It can kick the player
- It can give the player effects
- Play sound effects
- Send messages in chat

Features included, but not limited to:
- Commands
- Reputation

**DISCLAMER** *(deprecated as of A_5P, i guess)*: This mod does not mess with your world or server in ways that could get the player(s) blacklisted (or banned). All it can do is listed above.
